user.title: Lidl Plus Setup
user.description: Choose how to connect your Lidl Plus account.

browser_login.title: Lidl Plus – Browser Login
browser_login.description:
1. Open this URL in any browser (phone, laptop, etc.):

{auth_url}

2. Log in to your Lidl Plus account.
3. After login, the browser will redirect to a page that shows an error or nothing — that is normal.
4. Copy the full URL from the address bar and paste it below.

credentials.title: Lidl Plus – Email & Password
credentials.description: HA will attempt a direct (no browser) login. This may fail if Lidl enforces CAPTCHA.

token.title: Lidl Plus – Refresh Token
token.description: Paste a refresh token obtained from the lidl-auth script.

data.callback_url: Paste the redirect URL here (or leave empty to retry saved credentials)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired token / wrong credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Lidl Plus servers.
error.captcha_required: Lidl requires CAPTCHA — use the 'Open browser' method instead.
error.invalid_code: Could not extract an auth code from the pasted URL. Make sure you copied the full address bar URL after the redirect.

activate_all_coupons.name: Activate all coupons
activate_all_coupons.description: Activates all available Lidl Plus coupons immediately.
